reasoning.motor_allocation: 2drive+1arm+1claw pairs a front_omni+rear_standard drivetrain with a single arm+claw manipulator for grab and pull primitives.
reasoning.end_effector: claw_grasper chosen to grasp game objects (balls).
reasoning.arm_gear_ratio: 7:1 on the arm trades speed for the torque needed to lift and grasp.
reasoning.cartridge: 200rpm balances drivetrain speed against torque for this build.
reasoning.capability: reach_mm/max_grip_force_N/max_pull_force_N/com_height_mm are research-grounded starting figures for a VEX-class build at this gearing.
reasoning.predictive.grab: Starting grasp prediction (grip_force_N 14.7, duration_s 1.2) to be corrected by Replay/Synthetic telemetry.
